text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When asked about her next goal, Satono
Diamond says she wants to take the usual path of
illustrious runners—the Classic Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She possesses an unwavering will that has
garnered her so much support—a will that stems
from her mission to break the Satono family jinx.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wishing to repay her family for always supporting
her, she vows to make their dream come true by
winning a G1 race and breaking the jinx.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, she challenges Kitasan Black, who is
taking on the Classic Triple Crown tour this year.
There ought to be a lot to learn from this race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the time being, we'll learn what we can while
preparing for the upcoming Satsuki Sho!
